name: jd-navigator
title: Johnny.Decimal
description: Navigate a Johnny.Decimal filing system via jd-helper
author: justin

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Johnny.Decimal
commands.description: Fuzzy-search the JD tree and act on entries

preferences.name: roots
preferences.title: JD Roots
preferences.description: Root directories passed to jd-helper scan (space-separated)

preferences.name: primaryAction
preferences.title: Primary Action (Enter)
preferences.description: Which open action Enter triggers on directories

preferences.name: showFiles
preferences.title: Results
preferences.label: Include files (not just folders)
preferences.description: Show file entries in search results
